rules.lead-brain: Keep the user's goal, plan, progress, context, and final judgment in the Command Room.
rules.prompt-contract: Delegate execution through self-contained natural-language prompts.
rules.professional-roles: Use a professional role for each one-shot task.
rules.ai-review: Pass that result to a different sub-AI for checking, review, or acceptance.
rules.opposition: Ask an independent opposition sub-AI to work from the other direction.
rules.no-program-control: Program logic may transport prompt/result text and record objective facts, but must not decide AI work.
rules.hard-boundaries: Ask before a production/public effect, credentials or secrets, money, customer/private data exposure, deletion/migration, irreversible action, or a boundary/permission expansion.
rules.skillopt-regression: SkillOpt sends the skill and scenarios to an independent review AI; it does not run or replace the working AIs.

lead-brain: goal, plan, progress, context, and final judgment
ai-review: Pass that result to a different sub-AI
no-program-control: Program logic may transport prompt/result text
must not infer authorization, roles, completion, quality
skillopt-regression: does not run or replace the working AIs
